events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Chinese Hospital for client 1079. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: cardiovascular. Allergies: none. Sodium ceiling 600 mg/meal, carbs 40–70 g/meal. Prefers Filipino; dislikes nothing noted. Cooking ability: full. 7 meals/week, zone Chinatown.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Grilled Chicken Garden Salad
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 39 g outside 40–70 g range.

events.title: Rejected: Turkey Meatloaf with Roasted Vegetables
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 39 g outside 40–70 g range.

events.title: Matched: Baked Bangus with Garlic Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 396/600 mg ✓, carbs 47 g (target 40–70) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Ginataang Gulay with Rice

events.title: Matched: Chicken Tinola with Rice

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1079 added to route R-CHIN-1 (Chinatown), delivery 2026-07-21, window 12:00–14:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1079: 7 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
